parameters.content:
## W6-C: Living Documentation Engine

Runs daily (or click "Test workflow" for on-demand). Generates complete RIPCE system documentation using Claude Sonnet.

Output stored in iaasse_documentation Data Table.

✅ Credential: Anthropic account (assigned)

parameters.text:
={{ "Generate complete RIPCE system documentation based on this snapshot:

" + JSON.stringify($json) + "

Include these sections:
# 1. System Overview
# 2. Architecture & Data Flow (WF1→WF2→WF3→WF4)
# 3. Workflow Reference (each workflow: purpose, inputs, outputs, nodes)
# 4. Credential Setup Guide (step-by-step for each credential)
# 5. Daily Operations Checklist
# 6. Weekly Monitoring SOP
# 7. Troubleshooting Guide (common errors + exact fixes)
# 8. Credential Rotation Procedure
# 9. Incident Response Playbook
# 10. Scalability Notes

Write clearly for non-developer IAASSE administrators." }}
